---
title: "Wooyong Park"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: photos/gsb-headshot2.jpg
  links:
    - icon: file-text-fill
      text: CV
      href: ref/cv_public.pdf
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/wooyongp
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:wooyongp@stanford.edu
---


Welcome to my webpage!

<p align="justify">
I am a predoctoral research fellow at the [Golub Capital Social Impact Lab](https://www.gsb.stanford.edu/faculty-research/labs-initiatives/sil), Stanford GSB.
I am interested in studying applied microeconomics, causal inference, and machine learning applications in economics.
</p>

<p align="justify">
Usual disclaimer applies: all posts here represent my own opinions and do not reflect the views of any of my past or present affiliations.
</p>


<br>


### Education
- B.A. in Economics and Applied Statistics
  + Yonsei University, 2025
